prompt:
Ultra-realistic fashion editorial shot of a young male model with short curly hair and light stubble, wearing yellow-tinted rectangular sunglasses and a monochrome beige athleisure outfit (relaxed sweatshirt and joggers), paired with chunky off-white sneakers.

Composition:
Full-body shot, slightly low angle. The model is leaning casually with hands in pockets against a giant oversized sneaker positioned vertically behind him, as if it’s a sculptural object. The sneaker is hyper-detailed, modern chunky sole design, soft matte texture, neutral tones matching the outfit.

Pose & Expression:
Relaxed, confident stance, body slightly tilted back, one leg subtly forward. Calm, minimal expression, looking directly at camera.

Background:
Minimalist studio with a bold, saturated red backdrop and glossy reflective floor creating a clean mirror reflection beneath both the model and the oversized shoe.

Lighting:
Soft diffused studio lighting with subtle highlights and controlled shadows. Even illumination, high-end campaign look, no harsh contrast.

Style & Aesthetic:
Luxury streetwear campaign, surreal scale contrast (giant object vs human), clean composition, strong negative space, editorial photography, ultra-sharp focus, natural skin texture, 8K resolution.

Color Palette:
Monochrome beige outfit and shoe contrasted against vivid red background for strong visual impact.

Keywords:
surreal fashion, oversized object, modern streetwear, minimalism, reflective floor, high-fashion campaign, product-focused composition, cinematic lighting
